    Build a Merkle root over an array of commitment hashes.

    Build a Merkle root with an explicit algorithm for intermediate nodes.

    Convert bytes to BN254 field elements (31-byte chunks, big-endian).

    Commitment layer for Primust policy engine adapters.

    P

    Full Poseidon2 permutation for BN254, t=4.

    Poseidon2 hash function over BN254 scalar field.
    Poseidon2.Sponge - Class in com.primust.core
    Poseidon2 sponge construction with rate=3, capacity=1, t=4.

    Poseidon2 hash over arbitrary bytes, matching TS/Python commitment implementations.

    R

    RC_FULL_BEGIN - Static variable in class com.primust.core.Constants
    First 4 full round constants (4 elements each).
    RC_FULL_END - Static variable in class com.primust.core.Constants
    Last 4 full round constants (4 elements each).
    RC_PARTIAL - Static variable in class com.primust.core.Constants
    56 partial round constants (first element only).
